meaning: n.设计,图案,花样,企图,图谋,(小说等的)构思,纲要v.设计,计划,谋划,构思
examples: She's good at art and design.
The product is at the design stage.
It was a simple but pleasing design.
The winner will work with the council on the final design for the square.
For Derrick it all comes down to a simple design criterion: Less is best.
